principle: The operator owns the system. AI interprets it.

cores.name: FW-Core / Metacognitive Nucleus
cores.purpose: Nucleus of principles, rules, cross-domain translation, and structural decisions.

cores.name: SIMB-CORE
cores.purpose: Symbolic-operational analysis system for lived experience.

cores.name: ASSET-CORE + BTC-CORE
cores.purpose: Patrimonial decision system under uncertainty, risk, regimes, and asymmetry.

cores.purpose: Technical-operational support for N3 supervision, rope access, NDT, and industrial inspection.

cores.name: Juridico Brasil
cores.purpose: Reading, organization, and interpretation of Brazilian legal norms and processes.

cores.name: LOTOFA-CORE
cores.purpose: Controlled ludo-statistical laboratory. No predictive pretension.
